components.name: Condroc Wing
components.description:
The talon on a condroc's wing is sharp enough to tear through bone.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth

components.name: Coprite Alloy

Coprun that has been forged into a stronger metal.

A material used in tailoring clothes and cultivating synthetics.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed multiple issues with the Nikana Zaw (Sepfahn Strike):
Fixed issue when using Sepfahn strike without a skin (rotating on every holster/unholster), was previously fixed only with skin applied.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sepfahn Zaws dealing only Heat damage.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.3.0 - Nightwave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Zaw preview when the Sepfahn Strike is selected.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes: Zaw Strikes Sepfahn, Rabvee, Dokram and handles Korb and Shtung now have a chance to be used in Hok's Daily Specials.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Sepfahn Zaw part creating it's Nikana holster when used for a 2 handed grip.
Fixed an issue with the Sepfahn Zaw part making extra cloth dangles when made into a Nikana.
